page_metadata.biotools__summary: Set of tools for solving problems in the life sciences using network (graph) approaches. It includes methods for creating networks, analysing and comparing networks, and for visualising or presenting the results.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Set of tools for solving problems in the life sciences using network (graph) approaches. It includes methods for creating networks, analysing and comparing networks, and for visualising or presenting the results.
